description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Add functionality to edit offline account UUID  
2. Fix the issue where the absence of a GLFW method prevents 26.2-pre-4 from starting  
3. Improve the prompt for Microsoft login when no purchase is detected  
4. Fix the issue where the translation query dialog may cause the launcher to crash on some devices  
5. Fix the issue where game content cannot be searched using Chinese

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.增加编辑离线账户UUID功能
2.修复由于GLFW方法缺失导致26.2-pre-4无法启动的问题
3.优化微软登录未购买提示
4.修复翻译查询对话框在部分设备上可能导致启动器闪退的问题
5.修复无法用中文搜索游戏内容的问题
